channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Qobuz Connect Gives Older Cambridge Audio Speakers A Boost
item.description: Cambridge Audio adds Qobuz Connect to older StreamMagic hardware. Stream 24-bit high-res audio to your favorite legacy devices.

item.title: Yoko Taro To Create The Scenario For A New ‘Evangelion’ Anime Series
item.description: As part of the 30th anniversary celebration for 'Evangelion', a new anime series was announced with Yoko Taro in charge of the script and scenario.

item.title: ‘Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake’ Gets A New Demo On Steam
item.description: After playing the game at last year’s Tokyo Game Show, I was actually quite impressed with the 'Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake', and now there’s a demo o...

item.title: 5 Engaging Staff Meeting Activities to Boost Team Morale
item.description: Discover 5 engaging staff meeting activities designed to boost team morale and foster collaboration. Transform your meetings into dynamic sessions tha...

item.title: Surprising New Trend Of Agentic AI ‘Renting Humans’ To Perform Tasks That The AI Wants Done On Its Behalf
item.description: Agentic AI is renting humans. Yes, AI reaches out to find humans that will perform tasks on behalf of the AI. It's a new trend. An AI Insider scoop.

item.title: What Does Paychex HRS Payment Mean on My Bank Statement?
item.description: Discover what "Paychex HRS Payment" means on your bank statement. Learn about this payment type, how it relates to payroll services, and what to expec...

item.title: The Last Brushstroke: How AI Is Expanding The World Of Art
item.description: How an AI generated painting sold for half a million dollars — and what it means for the future of art, creativity and business.

item.title: Time is the wildcard
item.description: There are two feet of snow blocking your car from the road. This is a problem. Except it’s not a problem if you don’t need to leave the house for a fe...

item.title: 10 Engaging Activities for Building Stronger Relationships
item.description: Discover 10 engaging relationship building activities that will strengthen your connections and foster deeper bonds. Enhance your personal and profess...

item.title: 7 Essential Customer Satisfaction Survey Templates
item.description: Discover the 7 essential customer satisfaction survey templates designed to enhance your feedback collection process. Find the perfect template for cu...

item.title: Where Do I Go to Get My Background Check?
item.description: Discover the best options for obtaining your background check in our comprehensive guide. Learn where to go to get your background check, including on...

item.title: Sarcasm self-defeats
item.description: Sarcasm is an easy way to amplify feedback. It has two hidden costs: If you have confidence in your standing and your idea, then sarcasm is simply get...

item.title: Should you keep playing your hit song?
item.description: It depends. A freelancer, a brand, a musician–they’re here to serve. If people come to the restaurant for your famous marinara sauce, if new clients h...

item.title: Blizzard pasttimes
item.description: Millions of folks are about to get snowed in. Stay safe. Here’s a code for last year’s Thriving with AI course on Udemy. It’s free for the first 1,000...

item.title: Brown rice and status
